Cellosaurus_issues: Misidentified/contaminated. Shown to be identical to MEL-Wei. This cell line was reported to be isogenic with LCL-Ho (CVCL_1868) but it does not have the same STR profile (PubMed=10508494; PubMed=20143388). According to DSMZ ACC-62 it is a human female cell line.
Possibly contaminated. May be identical to OC 314 (CVCL_1616) according to STR profiling done at ICLC and to MSI data (PubMed=15677628).
Often called PLC8024 in Chinese literature probably because of a concatenation between PLC/PRF/5 and ATCC-8024
